title: bug: ChatsDelta retain is O(n*m) — use HashSet for destroyed IDs
description: app.rs: self.chats.retain(|c| !destroyed.iter().any(|d| c.id == d.as_str())) is O(n*m) where n=chat count and m=destroyed count. Both are server-controlled. Fix: collect destroyed into HashSet<&str> before retain for O(n+m).
